title: Fallen — four-name memorial list (Spencer Sloan, David Morris, Eric Cortez, Victor Ruiz)
html:
Fallen — four-name memorial list

Source: 2026-02-20 Apple Note titled "Fallen." Four names, no commentary. Same day as the Emily Stevens call — the heaviest single-day pairing in the Feb 2026 stretch.

TL;DR

  • The four fallen: Spencer Sloan, David Morris, Eric Cortez, Victor Ruiz.
  • David Morris was previously surfaced in 2023 03 24 thoughts on ai emergence as the "middle-school football reference" used as an anti-credentialism data point — but that note's contextual hint of "vic" being deceased (grieved by David in Jan 2024) implies "Vic" may be Victor Ruiz here.
  • Same surname pattern as the 2024-01 grief context: the Vic referenced as deceased in the dad-in-bad-state late-night-cry note has a strong candidate identity now.
  • This is the shortest-prose / highest-weight note in the corpus — four names, modified once, never expanded. The memorial-list genre.
  • Pairs unintentionally with the "ferociously obsessed" note from 2 months earlier — the contrast between the life-engulfed manifesto register and the fallen memorial register is the full emotional range Yahir keeps in one Apple Notes folder.

Key quote

(no prose — names function as quote)

Pattern observed

The four names sit unannotated. This is deliberate — the list isn't a journal entry, it's a register. Yahir uses this same instinct in the gratitude list (alive recipients), in the Comrades list (alive friends), in the Goodbyes list (alive farewells) — but this is the only such list pointed at the dead.

The memorial-list genre completes the list-as-relationship-audit set: gratitude (debt to alive), comrades (commitment to alive), goodbyes (closure with alive), fallen (memory of dead). Four registers, same form.

Open questions

  • How did each die? Single causes (one accident, one suicide, one illness) or distributed?
  • Spencer Sloan, Eric Cortez — first appearances in the corpus? Likely Grants Pass / OSU-era contemporaries.
  • Is Victor Ruiz the same Vic as in the Jan 2024 dad in bad state note? Confirming would tighten the chronology of when David's friend Vic died.
  • Was Feb 20, 2026 a memorial date (anniversary), or an unprompted register-the-loss day?

Related

  • 2024 01 04 thoughts on 1323 dad in bad state — Vic context
  • 2025 04 20 people i am indebted to for helping me — alive-debt register
  • 2025 05 13 list of comrades for legacy — alive-commitment register
  • 2025 06 09 goodbyes — alive-farewell register
  • 2026 02 20 call with emily stevens — same-day call
  • legacy question
  • grants pass or
  • yahir family
  • austin tx
